```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.1em 1.05em 1.15em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- hidden canonical template, copied verbatim by the Copy button (textContent) -->
<pre id="skill-template-src" style="display:none;">---
name: my-skill
description: What it does and when to use it.
---

# My Skill

State the goal in one line.

## Steps

1. First step here.
2. Next step here.

## Notes

- A rule or example to follow.
</pre>

 <!-- two columns: SKILL.md template (left) | what each part is (right) -->
 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 0.85fr;gap:1em;align-items:stretch;">

  <!-- LEFT: the copyable SKILL.md -->
  <div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">
   <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.32em 0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
    <span style="margin-left:0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;">my-skill/SKILL.md</span>
    <button class="copy-prompt-btn" aria-label="Copy SKILL.md template" style="margin-left:auto;color:#8FC7FF;background:rgba(58,125,201,0.18);border-color:rgba(143,199,255,0.35);" onclick="var b=this;navigator.clipboard.writeText(document.getElementById('skill-template-src').textContent).then(function(){var l=b.querySelector('.copy-label');l.textContent='Copied!';setTimeout(function(){l.textContent='Copy';},1500);});">
     <i data-lucide="copy" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i><span class="copy-label">Copy</span>
    </button>
   </div>
   <div style="padding:0.7em 1em 0.85em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.48em;line-height:1.55;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
    <div style="color:#5C6B80;">---</div>
    <div><span style="color:#69B4F0;">name:</span> <span style="color:#27C93F;">my-skill</span></div>
    <div><span style="color:#69B4F0;">description:</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">What it does and when to use it.</span></div>
    <div style="color:#5C6B80;">---</div>
    <div style="height:0.45em;"></div>
    <div style="color:#FF6F8E;font-weight:700;"># My Skill</div>
    <div style="height:0.25em;"></div>
    <div style="color:#B8B2C0;">State the goal in one line.</div>
    <div style="height:0.35em;"></div>
    <div style="color:#FF6F8E;font-weight:700;">## Steps</div>
    <div style="color:#B8B2C0;">1. First step here.</div>
    <div style="color:#B8B2C0;">2. Next step here.</div>
    <div style="height:0.35em;"></div>
    <div style="color:#FF6F8E;font-weight:700;">## Notes</div>
    <div style="color:#B8B2C0;">- A rule or example to follow.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT: what each part is for -->
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;text-align:left;">
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.15em;"><i data-lucide="tag" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:2;color:#5654A2;"></i><span style="font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">name</span></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">The skill's id and slash command. Lowercase, kebab-case.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.15em;"><i data-lucide="search" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:2;color:#2C8475;"></i><span style="font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">description</span></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">One line. How the AI decides when to reach for the skill.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(196,136,26,0.22);">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.15em;"><i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:2;color:#C4881A;"></i><span style="font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">body</span></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">The prompt loaded on invocation: steps, rules, examples to follow.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <!-- divider -->
 <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#C4C3E8,transparent);margin:1em 0 0;"></div>

 <!-- closing line -->
 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.55em;margin-top:0.8em;font-size:0.58em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.4;text-align:left;">
  <i data-lucide="sparkles" style="width:1.1em;height:1.1em;stroke-width:2;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"></i>
  <span>Start from this template and build your skill with the help of <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">AI</span>.</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
